allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const d = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('frontend/app/assets/data/judete.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('Counties:', d.judete.length\); let total = 0; d.judete.forEach\(j => total += j.localitati.length\); console.log\('Total localities:', total\); console.log\('First:', d.judete[0].auto, d.judete[0].nume\);")
